data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'signature certificate with full chain of custody.' However, the evidence provided does not include any information or API endpoints that confirm the existence or implementation of such a certificate. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks concrete evidence of the signature certificate or its custody chain, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a signature certificate with a full chain of custody.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Provide evidence of signature certificate implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a signature certificate with a full chain of custody is generated and stored.
